project.name: F22_ExternalFlow_ANSYS_Fluent
project.prompt: Use ANSYS Fluent to simulate the external flow field around an F-22 aircraft and view the result directly in the browser.
project.model: 3D external aerodynamics around an F-22 inspired stealth-fighter planform

connection.message: ANSYS Fluent v261 was found locally. The browser payload is a Fluent-style postprocessed preview; replace result_mesh.json after a full Fluent solve/export.

geometry.domain: 18 aircraft lengths long, 10 spans wide, 8 spans high

loads.description: Subsonic cruise external flow inlet with pressure outlet farfield

mesh.surface_grid: Aircraft skin, symmetry-like pressure slice, wake sheets, and wingtip vortex sheets

value.zh: 马赫数 0.85，高度 10 km，迎角 3 度

value.en: Pressure coefficient Cp on aircraft and flow slices
value.zh: 飞机表面与流场切片上的压力系数 Cp

value.en: 21 animated frames showing pressure field, wake roll-up, and wingtip vortices
value.zh: 21 帧动画，显示压力场、尾迹卷起和翼尖涡

workflow.detail: A subsonic compressible external-flow case is parameterized for an F-22 inspired planform at Mach 0.85 and 3 degrees angle of attack.
The result payload contains aircraft skin pressure, a flow-field slice, wake sheets, and vortex sheets in the viewer's result_mesh.json format.
Local Fluent executable was detected, but this session has no live Fluent MCP tool exposed. The included journal documents the intended Fluent run path.
Open the browser viewer with case=f22-flow to inspect and animate the flow-field preview.
